---
title: "Assignment 3 (Draft 2)"
author: "Exauce Mbuyi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(psych)
library(clue)
library(fpc)
library(patchwork)
library(mclust)
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)
library(kohonen)
library(colorspace)
library(readr)
library(viridis)
library(scales)
library(tidyverse)
library(GGally)
library(kableExtra)
library(knitr)
library(corrplot)
load("airbnbListings.RData")
```

\section{Part One:}

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
raw_data <- Airbnb_Excel_Lab_AAMB_Co

# Imputing all NA's:
clean_raw_data <- raw_data %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~replace_na(., median(., na.rm = TRUE))))

numeric_cols <- sapply(clean_raw_data, is.numeric)
numeric_data <- clean_raw_data[, numeric_cols]
data_scaled <- scale(numeric_data)

res <- cor(data_scaled, use = "complete.obs")

corrplot(res, 
         method = "color", 
         order = "hclust",    
         addrect = 4,            
         tl.cex = 0.6,           
         tl.col = "black",
         cl.cex = 0.7,
         main = "Clustered Correlation Heatmap")

data_scaled_df <- as.data.frame(data_scaled)

clean_data <- as.data.frame(data_scaled) %>%
  select(-any_of(c(
    "Availability_30", "Availability_60", "Availability_90", "Availability_365",
    "Booked_30", "Booked_60", "Booked_365",
    "Revenue_30", "Revenue_60", "Revenue_90",
    "Host_Total_Listings_Count", "ID", "Host_ID",
    "Beds", "Bedrooms",
    "Number_of_reviews_ltm", "Number_of_reviews_l30d",
    "Review_Scores_Rating"
  ))) %>%
  as.matrix()

res2 <- cor(clean_data, use = "complete.obs")

corrplot(res2, 
         method = "color", 
         order = "hclust",    
         addrect = 4,            
         tl.cex = 0.6,           
         tl.col = "black",
         cl.cex = 0.7,
         main = "Clustered Correlation Heatmap")

kmo_results <- KMO(clean_data)

# APPLYING FACTOR ANALYSIS:
fa.parallel(clean_data, n.iter = 100, main = "Scree Plot with Parallel Analysis")

fa_final <- fa(clean_data, 
               nfactors = 3, 
               rotate = "varimax", 
               fm = "pa")

print(fa_final$loadings, cutoff = 0.3)

# OBTAINING THE DATA IN TERMS OF THE FACTOR SCORES:
FA_data <- as.data.frame(fa_final$scores)
FA_data <- FA_data %>%
  rename(
    Reputation = PA1,
    Popularity = PA2,
    Scale_Price = PA3
  )

# OBTAINING THE FINAL DATA FOR CLUSTERING:
char_vars <- clean_raw_data %>%
  select(where(is.character))

extra_vars <- clean_raw_data %>%
  select(Booked_90, Host_Listings_Count, Latitude, Longitude)

final_data <- cbind(FA_data, char_vars, extra_vars)

# REMOVING PERFECTLY CORRELATED VARIABLES AND UNNECESSARY VARIABLES:
final_data <- final_data %>%
  select(-any_of(c(
    "Picture_URL", 
    "Host_Name_Trimmed & Proper", 
    "Neighbourhood_Proper & Trim"
  )))

final_data <- final_data[ , -6]

# RENAMING VARIABLES:
final_data <- final_data %>%
  rename(
    Ward_Level = Neighbourhood_Cleansed,
    Property_Type = `Property_Type_Proper & Trim`
  )
```

\section{Part One:}

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# SCATTER PLOT MATRIX OF THE FACTORS:
pairs.panels(FA_data, 
             method = "pearson", 
             hist.col = "#00AFBB",
             density = TRUE,  
             ellipses = TRUE,
             lm = TRUE)

# EDA ON WARD AVERAGES:
ward_averages <- data.frame(
  FA_data,
  Ward = Airbnb_Excel_Lab_AAMB_Co$Neighbourhood_Cleansed
)

Ward_averages <- PC_Summary %>% 
  group_by(Ward) %>% 
  summarise(across(starts_with("PC"), mean, .names = "avg_col{.col}"))
```
